lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- DEATHWATCH VETERANS
- FORTIS KILL TEAM

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 4+, Devastating Wounds, Ignores Cover, Torrent

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 1 wound remaining.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
- DEATHWATCH VETERANS
- FORTIS KILL TEAM

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 4+, Devastating Wounds, Ignores Cover, Torrent

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or KILL TEAM models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Chaplain Cassius has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Garran Branatar has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this unit contains Chaplain Cassius, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests for this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Chaplain Cassius has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Garran Branatar has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, subtract 1 from that test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" of that token and not within 9" of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a TERMINATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, or makes a melee attack in a turn in which it made a Charge move, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER unit from your army can be attached to a HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INFILTRATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead. 
If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step, that Leader unit gains the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

entries.name: Kill Team Sergeant w/ Jump Pack

profiles.name: Kill Team Sergeant w/ Jump Pack

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn:
- Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1. 
- Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an ASSAULT INTERCESSORS WITH JUMP PACKS unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.
